english: there (direction away from speaker) / gone / along
notes: Used to indicate direction away from the speaker. Often used as a separable prefix in verbs (hingehen, hinfahren, etc.). Also used in expressions like 'hin und her' (back and forth) or 'hin und wieder' (now and then). Colloquially means 'ruined/gone' (e.g. Das ist hin = That's done for).

sentences.german: Ich gehe hin und schaue mir das an.
sentences.english: I'll go there and have a look.

sentences.german: Hin und wieder besuche ich meine Großeltern.
sentences.english: Now and then I visit my grandparents.
